panels.description: Number of times the heart beats in one minute. It is an important vital sign: it indicates how fast the heart is working to pump blood through the body.
panels.title: Hearth Rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT "heart_rate" FROM "health_vitals" WHERE "time" >= $__timeFrom AND "time" <= $__timeTo ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Measure of heat in the body.
panels.title: Body Temperature

panels.description: Measure of heat in the body.

targets.rawSql: SELECT "body_temperature" FROM "health_vitals" WHERE "time" >= $__timeFrom AND "time" <= $__timeTo ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Percentage of red blood cells in the blood that are carrying oxygen. Indicates how oxygenated the blood circulating through your body is.
panels.title: Oxygen Saturation

targets.rawSql: SELECT "oxygen_saturation" FROM "health_vitals" WHERE "time" >= $__timeFrom AND "time" <= $__timeTo ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: The force with which blood pushes against the walls of the arteries when the heart beats. It is expressed by two numbers: the systolic pressure (the higher value, coincides with the contraction of the heart or heartbeat) and the diastolic pressure (the lower value, corresponds to the relaxation of the heart between beats).
panels.title: Blood pressure

panels.description: The force with which blood pushes against the walls of the arteries when the heart beats. It is expressed by two numbers: the systolic pressure (the higher value, coincides with the contraction of the heart or heartbeat) and the diastolic pressure (the lower value, corresponds to the relaxation of the heart between beats).

targets.rawSql: SELECT "systolic_bp" FROM "health_vitals" WHERE "time" >= $__timeFrom AND "time" <= $__timeTo ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT "diastolic_bp" FROM "health_vitals" WHERE "time" >= $__timeFrom AND "time" <= $__timeTo ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Number of breaths (inhalations and exhalations) you take in one minute. This indicator reflects the basic functioning of your lungs and respiratory system.
panels.title: Breathing Rate

panels.description: Number of breaths (inhalations and exhalations) you take in one minute. This indicator reflects the basic functioning of your lungs and respiratory system.

targets.rawSql: SELECT "breathing_rate" FROM "health_vitals" WHERE "time" >= $__timeFrom AND "time" <= $__timeTo ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1
